<a id="class-rduniform"></a>

# RDUniform

**Inherits:** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Shader uniform (used by [RenderingDevice](class_renderingdevice.md#class-renderingdevice)).

## Description

This object is used by [RenderingDevice](class_renderingdevice.md#class-renderingdevice).

| [int](class_int.md#class-int)                                            | [binding](#class-rduniform-property-binding)           | `0`   |

<a id="class-rduniform-property-binding"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **binding** = `0` [🔗](#class-rduniform-property-binding)

-  **set_binding**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))

<a id="class-rduniform-property-uniform-type"></a>

[UniformType](class_renderingdevice.md#enum-renderingdevice-uniformtype) **uniform_type** = `3` [🔗](#class-rduniform-property-uniform-type)

-  **set_uniform_type**(value: [UniformType](class_renderingdevice.md#enum-renderingdevice-uniformtype))

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-rduniform-method-add-id"></a>

 **add_id**(id: [RID](class_rid.md#class-rid)) [🔗](#class-rduniform-method-add-id)

Binds the given id to the uniform. The data associated with the id is then used when the uniform is passed to a shader.

---

<a id="class-rduniform-method-clear-ids"></a>

 **clear_ids**() [🔗](#class-rduniform-method-clear-ids)

Unbinds all ids currently bound to the uniform.

---

<a id="class-rduniform-method-get-ids"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[RID](class_rid.md#class-rid)] **get_ids**()  [🔗](#class-rduniform-method-get-ids)

Returns an array of all ids currently bound to the uniform.
